name: cog-second-brain
description: Self-evolving second brain with 17 AI agent skills, 6 worker agents, and people CRM. Inspired by Garry Tan's gstack specialist sessions and gbrain knowledge patterns. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Kiro, Gemini CLI, Codex, and any markdown-reading agent.

skills.name: onboarding
skills.description: Personalize COG for your workflow - creates profile, interests, and watchlist files (run this first!)

skills.name: braindump
skills.description: Quick capture of raw thoughts with intelligent domain classification and competitive intelligence extraction

skills.name: daily-brief
skills.description: Generate personalized news intelligence with verified sources (7-day freshness requirement)

skills.name: weekly-checkin
skills.description: Cross-domain pattern analysis and strategic reflection for weekly review

skills.name: knowledge-consolidation
skills.description: Build frameworks from scattered insights across all braindumps and notes

skills.name: url-dump
skills.description: Quick capture URLs with automatic content extraction, insights, and categorization into knowledge booklets

skills.name: team-brief
skills.description: Cross-reference GitHub, Linear, Slack, PostHog, meetings, and braindumps into a daily team intelligence brief with Linear sync-back

skills.name: meeting-transcript
skills.description: Process meeting recordings into structured decisions, action items, and team dynamics

skills.name: comprehensive-analysis
skills.description: Deep 7-day analysis for weekly reviews, board prep, or strategic planning

skills.name: update-cog
skills.description: Check for and apply upstream COG framework updates without touching personal content

skills.name: auto-research
skills.description: Deep strategic research engine with parallel research threads and actionable analysis

skills.name: create-user-story
skills.description: Create user stories with duplicate checking across Linear, GitHub Issues, or Jira

skills.name: generate-prd
skills.description: Draft PRDs with approval gate before publishing to Confluence or Notion

skills.name: generate-release-notes
skills.description: Generate release notes from GitHub milestones, Linear cycles, or manual input

skills.name: export-open-issues
skills.description: Audit and export open issues from any project tracker

skills.name: publish-to-confluence
skills.description: Publish vault markdown files to Confluence

skills.name: update-knowledge-base
skills.description: Maintain product knowledge base from releases and feature updates

features: Privacy-first architecture with strict domain separation
Plain text markdown files (no database, no vendor lock-in)
Multi-device sync via iCloud (iPhone, iPad, Mac)
Git version control for tracking thinking evolution
Worker agent architecture with model routing (Sonnet workers, Opus lead)
People CRM with tiered enrichment and evidence-based profiles

requirements.git: Optional but recommended for version control and safe updates
requirements.claudeCode: Recommended for the full 17-skill native experience
requirements.agentsMd: Universal fallback surface for Codex and other markdown-reading agents

installation.quickStart: Clone the repo, cd into COG-second-brain, then run onboarding in your agent of choice
installation.validation: Run ./scripts/validate-agent-surface.sh before publishing or after framework updates

directoryStructure..claude/agents: 6 worker agent definitions for specialist sessions
directoryStructure..claude/roles: 7 role packs for personalized skill and integration recommendations
directoryStructure.AGENTS.md: Universal command surface for Codex and other agents
directoryStructure.00-inbox: Temporary processing area with profile and interests files

skillArchitecture.description: Self-contained skills with worker agent delegation, full Claude Code surface, core native Kiro/Gemini surfaces, and AGENTS.md as the universal fallback
